scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,storefront,admin,pos -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run storefront:dev" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run admin:dev" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run pos:dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build:skip-tsc --workspace=admin" "npm run build --workspace=storefront" "npm run build --workspace=backend" "npm run build --workspace=pos"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,storefront,admin,pos -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start:prod --workspace=backend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run start --workspace=storefront" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run preview --workspace=admin" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.js && npm run preview --workspace=pos"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
